title: Compress files tutorial - Increase disk space. Smaller / Size / Zip

messages.content: # Running out of space on your PC and don’t want to delete anything? Follow this guide!
> This can help save space if you have lots of cars/tracks and you're running low on storage. This will not affect performance in any way. If anything it will increase it but by negligible amounts.

# Method 1
> Open Content Manager and go to Content > Tools > Compress Files
> **YOU CAN NOT PLAY UNTIL THE COMPRESSION HAS FINISHED**
